name: Mr. D. Dean
subtitle: the out-of-town gentleman

ultimate_ability.label: The Note Under the Bill
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Dean writes the small note (a phone number, three words) and tucks it under a hundred-dollar bill. The next staff visitor who sits with him receives the note; the run's primary lore_token is doubled in priority on the ledger.

notes: Mr. D. Dean. The long-game watcher. Plain face, plain shoes, the lapels-smoothing tic of a man who once cared deeply about appearance. Moves through the canon like a chess piece: dropping a card here, refusing a menu there. His hand is unfinished by design — the bespoke cards arrive scenario-by-scenario, declared inline. Source: vol5 ch3 Empress (Table 14), recurrence in vol5 ch10 Wheel + ch11 Justice.
